value: We document the moments that change businesses.
Each case study walks through the situation, the pressure, the options, the decision, and what happened next.
These are not highlight reels. They are honest breakdowns of how founders move forward.

The point is not to package success neatly. The point is to show what business actually feels like when the decision is real and the outcome matters.
That honesty is what makes the stories useful.

value: Some stories are public. Some go deeper inside membership.
Public stories give you a way into the thinking.
Inside The Decision Room, there is more room for reflection, supporting tools, and the kind of context that helps the lesson travel into your own work.
What To Do With The Story
Read for the decision, not the performance.
If you are looking for polished success theater, this is not that.
If you are looking for honest decision-making you can learn from, you are in the right place.
